projects.tagline: We automated the sending of labor documents to CreateRD with a resilient and traceable pipeline.
projects.businessProblem: The client needs to upload thousands of labor PDFs to the CreateRD master platform without relying on manual processes and with full error traceability.
projects.solutionOverview: ASP.NET Core 8 MVC application that monitors a shared folder, extracts metadata from file nomenclature, normalizes information and sends JSON batches to the CreateRD API, with administrative dashboard, circuit breaker and audit of each step.

keyFeatures.name: 4-stage pipeline
keyFeatures.description: Detector, Parser, Normalize and Sender are chained to take a PDF from the local folder to the external API.
keyFeatures.value: Reduces operational time and homogenizes data before integrating it.

keyFeatures.name: Smart nomenclature parser
keyFeatures.description: Analyzes tokens in the file name to infer record type, IDs, dates and main actor (worker/company/freelancer).
keyFeatures.value: Allows integrating heterogeneous sources without human intervention.
highlights: Friendly error messages for manual review

keyFeatures.name: Normalization and audit
keyFeatures.description: Derives canonical company/center names and saves snapshots before/after normalization.
keyFeatures.value: Guarantees consistency in sent data and facilitates later audits.

keyFeatures.name: Administrative dashboard
keyFeatures.description: Panel with metrics by status, historical series and top companies, plus filtered queue views.
keyFeatures.value: Offers real-time visibility for operations and support.

layers: Services for pipeline and external clients

dataFlow.output: Extracted fields, Parsed/Error status, Parsing log
POST CreateRD, Accepted/Rejected/Error status, circuit breaker

observability.metrics: In-memory collector exposed for Prometheus/Grafana scraping.

security.identity: ASP.NET Identity with Admin role seeding and admin@startup user.
security.config: ApiKey and BaseUrl read from appsettings/user secrets.

risksAndChallenges: Disparate nomenclatures can break the parser: mitigated with RequiresManualReview and specific messages.
Shared folder availability: Detector implements exponential backoff and dedicated logging.
Definitive CreateRD integration pending: circuit breaker enabled and payload centralized in ToRegistroDocumento extension.

impact.ops: Reduces document integration times from hours to minutes and enables centralized tracking.
impact.quality: Business rules and audits reduce rejections due to inconsistent data.
impact.scalability: Batch pipeline supports increasing frequency and volume without blocking the UI.

nextIterations: Connect HttpClient to CreateRD production endpoint
Add FileSystemWatcher for near real-time detection
Publish metrics in Prometheus/Grafana and alerts in Slack/Teams
Complete notifications module (tables already outlined in DbContext)

screenshots.description: Dashboard with metrics by status and top companies

projects.callToAction: Available to show technical demo of the end-to-end pipeline and delve into CreateRD integration.

projects.displayName: Notification sending and document signature system
projects.tagline: We centralized notifications and digital signature for CAEPro clients with delegated access.
projects.status: Ready for production environments with critical configuration validation
projects.businessProblem: Companies needed to centralize communication with workers and clients, guaranteeing reading and signing of critical documents without depending on local credentials.
projects.solutionOverview: ASP.NET Core MVC application that delegates administrative access through JWT, orchestrates the creation of messages and recipients, synchronizes data from the corporate master and completes the digital signature of documents with real-time tracking.

keyFeatures.name: Delegated access without local credentials
keyFeatures.description: Validates tokens issued by the master app and exchanges secure cookies to navigate the administrative panel.
keyFeatures.value: Avoids managing internal users and maintains centralized control in the main platform.

keyFeatures.name: Comprehensive message and recipient management
keyFeatures.description: Allows creating messages, attaching templates and managing recipients with pagination and data synchronization.
keyFeatures.value: Reduces operational friction and ensures each recipient has the information they need.

keyFeatures.name: Web and mobile digital signature
keyFeatures.description: Signature experience synchronized with SignalR, PDF generation and certificate application per worker.
keyFeatures.value: Guarantees legal validity and tracking of each signature without leaving the platform.
highlights: DinkToPdf converts HTML to PDF prior to signature
Certificates managed per worker and automatic activation
SignalR synchronizes signature between web and mobile

keyFeatures.name: Automatic synchronization and transactional notifications
keyFeatures.description: Updates worker data from the master and sends personalized emails with Brevo.
keyFeatures.value: Keeps contact updated and ensures delivery of key notifications.
highlights: EmailService with HTML templates and attachments

architecture.style: Modular MVC with specialized services and SignalR Hub
layers: Controllers and views for admin panel and public experience
Domain services for tokens, signatures, synchronization and email
EF Core data layer with soft-delete filters

dataFlow.output: Valid HttpOnly cookie for administrative panel
Digitally signed PDF and updated statuses
Brevo email with links/attachments and delivery record

observability.logging: Early configuration validation and detailed exceptions in key services.
observability.metrics: Health check /health and manual logs; specific metrics planned.

security.identity: Delegated access via signed JWTs; no local credentials stored.
security.authZ: Middleware requires valid token except public notification routes and static resources.
security.config: Shared secret, App:BaseUrl and Brevo ApiKey obtained from secure environment variables.

risksAndChallenges: Dependency on master app to issue tokens: mitigated with fake access in development.
Brevo integration requires secure API key management and error handling.
HTML→PDF conversion can be expensive; documented to migrate DinkToPdf to dedicated container.

impact.ops: Centralizes communication and reduces manual tasks by coordinating messages, signatures and deliveries from a single panel.
impact.quality: Worker synchronization and prior validations avoid failed deliveries or recipients without data.
impact.scalability: Service design and SignalR allow extending signature flows and adding more integrations.

nextIterations: Group SignalR connections by recipient/token to reduce global broadcast.
Automate archiving and versioning of signed PDFs.
Expose specific metrics (deliveries, signatures, errors) for Prometheus monitoring.
Add automated tests for critical controllers.
projects.callToAction: Schedule a demo to go through the complete flow: delegated access, message creation and synchronized digital signature.
